title: Required: Core
description: A Core mod for my "Required" series.
body:
Required: Core

Required: Core is the foundation mod for the Required mod series, designed to provide shared systems, materials, and mechanics used across all Required mods (like Flint Required, and future entries).

This mod does nothing by itself in regular gameplay — instead, it acts as a dependency that other Required mods rely on to function properly.

--------------------------------

🔧 What Does Required: Core Do?

Required: Core provides:

🧱 Shared materials & items (like Plant Fiber and future common resources)

⚙️ Unified crafting logic used by all Required mods

🧩 Common code & systems to reduce conflicts and improve stability

📦 Future-proof expansion support for upcoming Required mods

--------------------------------

This keeps every Required mod:

Lightweight

Consistent

Fully compatible with each other

--------------------------------

🧱 Mods That Use Required: Core

✅ Flint Required

⏳ More Required mods coming soon (String Required, Copper Required, etc.)

⚠️ If a Required mod depends on this, the game will not start without it installed.


--------------------------------

🎯 Goal of the Required Series

The Required mod series focuses on:

Vanilla-style progression

Slower, more meaningful early-game

Realistic material dependencies

No tech overload or complicated machines


--------------------------------

📌 Notes

This mod is a library/dependency

You do not need it unless a Required mod asks for it

Safe to include in modpacks
